columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: Line type or category code

columns.name: TRANSACTIONID
columns.description: Unique transaction identifier for the order line

columns.name: LINJENR
columns.description: Line number within an order

columns.name: EXTERNALID
columns.description: External reference identifier for the order line

columns.name: ORDERNO
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: ORDERLINENO
columns.description: Line number within the order document

columns.name: DISTRGROUPTECH
columns.description: Technical distribution group code

columns.name: MODEOFTRANSPORT
columns.description: Method of transport for the order line

columns.name: MODEOFTRANSPORTN
columns.description: Description of the method of transport

columns.name: GROSSWEIGHT
columns.description: Total weight of the order line

columns.name: VOLUME
columns.description: Volume of the order line

columns.name: AREA
columns.description: Surface area or coverage for the order line

columns.name: PLANNEDQUANTITY
columns.description: Scheduled quantity to be delivered

columns.name: QUANTITYUNIT
columns.description: Unit of measurement for the quantity

columns.name: FROMDATE
columns.description: Start date for the validity period

columns.name: TODATE
columns.description: End date for the validity period

columns.name: ARTICLENO
columns.description: Identifier of the product or item

columns.name: ARTICLENAME
columns.description: Name or description of the article

columns.name: ARTICLETYPE
columns.description: Product type code for the order line

columns.name: ARTICLETYPENAME
columns.description: Description of the product type

columns.name: PRODUCTGROUPNUMBER
columns.description: Code for the product group

columns.name: PRODUCTGROUPNAME
columns.description: Description of the product group

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL1
columns.description: First level in a hierarchy structure

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL1N
columns.description: Description of the first level in the hierarchy

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL2
columns.description: Second level in a hierarchy structure

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL2N
columns.description: Description of the second level in the hierarchy

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL3
columns.description: Third level in a hierarchy structure

columns.name: HIERARCHYLEVEL3N
columns.description: Description of the third level in the hierarchy

columns.name: EXTERNALARTICLENO
columns.description: External product identifier

columns.name: REFERENCEORDERNNO
columns.description: Reference order number for the line

columns.name: REFORDERLINENO
columns.description: Line number of a reference order

columns.name: REFORDERNUMBER

columns.name: REFERENCETABLENAME
columns.description: Table name of the reference data source

columns.name: REFORDERLINETYPE

columns.name: REFERENCEDISPLAYNAME
columns.description: Display name of the referenced data

columns.name: REFERENCETYPE
columns.description: Type of reference (e.g., internal, external)

columns.description: Unique identifier for the referenced data

columns.description: Timestamp of when the reference was created or last updated
